title: AI Agents
description: We build autonomous AI agents that read context, make decisions, and take action across your tools without a human in the loop. Classification, routing, drafting, and execution, running the moment work arrives.

headline.before: Agents that don't just answer. They

whyTitle: Where an agent beats a workflow
whyText: A standard automation follows fixed rules. An agent reasons. When the input is messy, ambiguous, or human, an agent decides what to do, the way a trained team member would, at a fraction of the cost.
checks: Reads unstructured input: emails, chats, documents, voice notes
Classifies intent and urgency, then routes to the right path
Drafts and sends context-aware replies for your approval or fully autonomously
Calls your tools directly: CRM, calendar, databases, payment systems
Escalates edge cases to a human with full context attached

useCases.title: Inbound lead qualification
useCases.description: Agent reads the enquiry, scores it, and books or routes it.

useCases.title: Support triage
useCases.description: Tickets classified and answered or escalated automatically.

useCases.title: Document processing
useCases.description: Invoices, contracts, and forms parsed into structured data.

useCases.title: Inbox management
useCases.description: High-volume inboxes sorted, drafted, and prioritized.

pricing.headline: Agent builds typically start at a 5–10 day scoped engagement
pricing.detail: Most production agents land in the 5–15 day range depending on tool integrations and approval gates. We quote a fixed scope after a short discovery call.

faq.question: What models do you use?
faq.answer: We work with Claude, GPT, and Gemini, chosen per task. Classification, drafting, and reasoning each have a best-fit model and we route accordingly.

faq.question: Will the agent act without my approval?
faq.answer: Your choice. We can run fully autonomous, or hold every action behind a one-click approval until you trust it.

faq.question: How do you prevent mistakes?
faq.answer: Confidence thresholds, human-in-the-loop fallbacks, and full logging. Low-confidence cases always escalate with context.

title: Workflow Automation
description: We turn the manual processes draining your team into reliable automated pipelines. Built on n8n, Make, and Zapier, connected to the tools you already use, monitored so they keep running.
whyTitle: Automation that survives contact with reality
whyText: Plenty of automations work in a demo and break in week two. We build with error handling, retries, logging, and alerts from day one, so the pipeline keeps working when an API changes or data comes in messy.
checks: Self-hosted n8n for full control and no per-task billing surprises
Error handling and retries so one bad record doesn't stop everything
Alerting when something needs a human, instead of silent failure
Clean documentation so your team can see exactly what runs and when
Certified n8n partner team building it

useCases.title: Lead-to-CRM sync
useCases.description: New leads enriched and pushed to your CRM instantly.

useCases.title: Reporting automation
useCases.description: Daily and weekly reports compiled and delivered automatically.

useCases.title: Data scraping
useCases.description: Structured data pulled from sites and marketplaces on schedule.

useCases.title: Onboarding flows
useCases.description: New customers walked through setup without manual steps.

pricing.headline: Most workflow builds run 3–8 days per process
pricing.detail: Simple single-process automations start small; multi-step pipelines with enrichment and error handling scale from there. Fixed scope, quoted up front.

faq.question: n8n, Make, or Zapier, which?
faq.answer: Depends on volume, control needs, and budget. We're a certified n8n partner and usually recommend self-hosted n8n for serious volume, but we build on all three.

faq.question: Do I own the automation?
faq.answer: Yes. Self-hosted builds live on your infrastructure. You keep full access and we hand over documentation.

faq.question: What if it breaks?
faq.answer: We build in alerting and offer monitoring retainers so issues get caught and fixed before they cost you.

title: CRM & Lead Automation
description: Stop losing leads to slow manual handling. We automate the full cycle: capture from any channel, enrich with real data, route to the right person, and trigger follow-up before the lead goes cold.
whyText: A lead contacted in the first five minutes converts far better than one contacted an hour later. We close that gap to seconds: the moment a lead arrives, it's enriched, scored, assigned, and followed up, without anyone touching it.
checks: Capture leads from forms, ads, email, chat, and LinkedIn into one place
Enrich with verified contact data via Apollo, Lusha, and NeverBounce
Score and segment automatically so reps work the best leads first
Trigger instant first-touch follow-up by email or message
Sync cleanly to HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, or your CRM of choice

useCases.title: Speed-to-lead
useCases.description: First contact triggered within seconds of a new lead.

useCases.title: Enriched lead lists
useCases.description: Daily verified, enriched CSV or CRM delivery.

useCases.title: Pipeline hygiene
useCases.description: Stale deals flagged, duplicates merged automatically.

useCases.title: Re-engagement
useCases.description: Dormant leads re-activated on a schedule.

pricing.headline: Lead automation engagements typically start at 4–8 days
pricing.detail: Scope depends on the number of channels, your CRM, and enrichment depth. We quote a fixed price after mapping your current funnel.

faq.question: Which CRMs do you support?
faq.answer: HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, and most others with an API. We've built production flows on all three.

faq.question: Where does enrichment data come from?
faq.answer: Apollo, Lusha, and similar providers, with NeverBounce verification so you're not paying for bad contacts.

faq.question: Can you fix our messy existing CRM?
faq.answer: Yes. Deduplication, field cleanup, and re-segmentation are common first steps before automation goes live.

title: MCP & AI Infrastructure
description: For teams past the prototype stage. We build self-hosted pipelines, MCP servers, and deployed systems that connect AI directly to your data and tools, securely, observably, and built to scale.
whyTitle: When a no-code tool isn't enough
whyText: No-code platforms hit a ceiling: cost per task, data privacy, custom logic, and volume. When you cross it, you need real infrastructure. We build MCP servers and self-hosted pipelines that give AI safe, structured access to your systems, on infrastructure you own.
checks: MCP servers that expose your data and tools to AI models safely
Self-hosted deployments on AWS or DigitalOcean, under your control
Observability with Langfuse so you can see every call, cost, and failure
PII handling and local redaction to keep sensitive data off third-party clouds
Built to scale from first user to high volume without a rebuild

useCases.title: Natural-language data search
useCases.description: Ask your database questions in plain English.

useCases.title: Secure AI access
useCases.description: Models that query internal data without exposing it.

useCases.title: Cost + quality monitoring
useCases.description: Track token spend and output quality per workflow.

useCases.title: Custom AI pipelines
useCases.description: Multi-stage model orchestration for complex tasks.

pricing.headline: Infrastructure engagements are scoped per project, typically multi-week
pricing.detail: These are senior builds. We scope precisely after a technical discovery and quote a fixed plan with milestones.

faq.question: What is MCP?
faq.answer: Model Context Protocol, a standard way to give AI models secure, structured access to your tools and data. It's how serious AI systems connect to the real world.

faq.question: Where is it hosted?
faq.answer: Your infrastructure: AWS, DigitalOcean, or your existing cloud. You own and control it.

faq.question: How do you keep our data private?
faq.answer: Local PII redaction with tools like Microsoft Presidio, self-hosting, and keeping sensitive data out of third-party model calls entirely where required.

title: Messaging Automation
description: We automate the channels your customers actually use. WhatsApp, email, and chat, with AI that reads, classifies, and responds in real time, captures structured data, and routes anything that needs a human.
whyText: This isn't theory. We run live WhatsApp-to-database pipelines today: messages classified by AI, structured into records, and synced automatically, on self-hosted infrastructure with buffering and two-path routing for reliability.
checks: WhatsApp automation via Whapi and self-hosted n8n, no platform lock-in
AI classification of every message by type, intent, and urgency
Structured data extraction straight into Airtable, a CRM, or a database
Buffered, multi-path architecture so nothing is dropped under load
Human handoff with full context when a conversation needs it

useCases.title: Dealer / order intake
useCases.description: Inbound messages parsed into structured deal records.

useCases.title: Lead capture on WhatsApp
useCases.description: Enquiries qualified and logged without manual entry.

useCases.title: Booking + scheduling
useCases.description: Appointments handled conversationally end to end.

useCases.title: Broadcast + follow-up
useCases.description: Targeted outbound that respects each customer's history.

pricing.headline: Messaging builds typically run 5–12 days
pricing.detail: Cost depends on channels, classification complexity, and where data needs to land. Fixed scope after a discovery call.

faq.question: Is WhatsApp automation allowed?
faq.answer: Yes, via approved API providers like Whapi. We build within platform rules so your number stays safe.

faq.question: What happens to the data?
faq.answer: It's structured and synced to wherever you want it: Airtable, a CRM, or your database. You own all of it.

faq.question: Can a human still step in?
faq.answer: Always. Anything the AI isn't confident about is handed to a person with the full conversation attached.

title: AI Audit
description: Before you spend on automation, know what's worth automating. Our fixed-scope AI Audit maps your processes, identifies the highest-ROI opportunities, and gives you a prioritized, costed roadmap you can act on, with or without us.
whyText: Most automation money is wasted on the wrong things first. The audit removes the guesswork: a clear, honest map of where AI saves you the most time and money, ranked by effort and return, so your first project is the one that pays for the rest.
checks: A structured review of your real workflows, not a generic checklist
Every opportunity scored by time saved, cost, and implementation effort
A prioritized roadmap: what to automate first, second, and later
Honest calls on what is not worth automating yet
A document your team owns and can act on with any provider

useCases.title: First-time automation
useCases.description: Know where to start before you commit budget.

useCases.title: Stalled AI efforts
useCases.description: Diagnose why past attempts didn't stick.

useCases.title: Tool consolidation
useCases.description: Find overlap and waste across your current stack.

useCases.title: Board-ready case
useCases.description: A costed plan you can take to decision-makers.

pricing.headline: Fixed-fee engagement, typically delivered within a week
pricing.detail: One flat price, one clear deliverable. If you move forward on a build with us, the audit fee is credited toward it.

faq.question: What do I actually get?
faq.answer: A written roadmap: your mapped processes, ranked automation opportunities with ROI and effort scores, and a recommended sequence.

faq.question: Do I have to build with you afterward?
faq.answer: No. The roadmap is yours to act on however you like. If you do build with us, the audit fee is credited.

faq.question: How long does it take?
faq.answer: Most audits are delivered within a week of the discovery call.

title: Shopify Automation
description: We automate the operational load behind your Shopify store, order routing, inventory sync, fulfillment updates, and customer notifications, connected to the rest of your stack through n8n, Make, or custom pipelines.
whyText: Shopify stores generate a constant stream of orders, inventory changes, and customer events. We automate the handoffs between Shopify, your warehouse, CRM, and support tools so nothing slips through when volume spikes.
checks: Connect to Shopify Admin GraphQL for products, orders, inventory, and customers
Pipelines on n8n, Make, or self-hosted infrastructure you control
Bridge Shopify with CRM, ERP, shipping, and support tools automatically
Retries, logging, and alerts so failed webhooks don't silently break ops
Production experience shipping Shopify automations alongside AI workflows

useCases.title: Order routing
useCases.description: Route orders to the right warehouse or fulfillment partner automatically.

useCases.title: Inventory sync
useCases.description: Keep stock aligned across Shopify, warehouses, and marketplaces.

useCases.title: Customer notifications
useCases.description: Shipping, returns, and post-purchase messages on autopilot.

useCases.title: Returns handling
useCases.description: Structured return flows logged to your CRM and support stack.

pricing.headline: Shopify automation builds typically run 5–10 days
pricing.detail: Scope depends on integrations, order volume, and fulfillment complexity. Fixed price after mapping your current ops flow.

faq.question: Which Shopify plans do you support?
faq.answer: Any plan with API access. We use the Admin GraphQL API for reliable, scalable integrations.

faq.question: Can you connect to our 3PL or ERP?
faq.answer: Yes. We bridge Shopify with shipping, warehouse, CRM, and ERP systems via API or middleware.

faq.question: What if a webhook fails?
faq.answer: We build retries, dead-letter queues, and alerting so failures are caught and replayed automatically.
